import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Instagram, Facebook, Youtube, Phone, Mail, MapPin, MessageCircle } from 'lucide-react'; const ADMIN_WHATSAPP = '919999999999'; function Logo({ size = 30 }) { return ( ); } export default function Footer() { return (
{/* Brand */}
FITNATION
BY AJEET

Uniting a healthier world. Premium fitness training, nutrition guidance, and supplements — all under one roof.

{[ { icon: , href: '#' }, { icon: , href: '#' }, { icon: , href: '#' }, ].map((s, i) => ( {s.icon} ))}
{/* Quick links */}

Explore

{[ { label: 'Exercise Library', path: '/exercises' }, { label: 'Diet Plans', path: '/diet' }, { label: 'Supplement Store', path: '/store' }, { label: 'Transformations', path: '/transformations' }, { label: 'About Us', path: '/about' }, ].map(l => ( {l.label} ))}
{/* Members */}

Members

{[ { label: 'Member Login', path: '/login' }, { label: 'My Dashboard', path: '/dashboard' }, { label: 'My Workout', path: '/my-workout' }, { label: 'My Progress', path: '/my-progress' }, { label: 'My Orders', path: '/my-orders' }, { label: 'Enquire', path: '/enquiry' }, ].map(l => ( {l.label} ))}
{/* Contact */}

Contact

+91 99999 99999 info@fitnation.com
123 Fitness Street, Your City, India
Chat on WhatsApp
{/* Bottom bar */}

© {new Date().getFullYear()} FITNATION BY AJEET. All rights reserved.

"Uniting a Healthier World"

); }
